## Contribution

What question does this change answer, and what is genuinely new for the reader?

## Evidence and integrity

- [ ] Primary or authoritative sources support important factual claims.
- [ ] Evidence, inference, and speculation are distinguished.
- [ ] Strong objections and limitations are represented fairly.
- [ ] Code, data, and external links were checked.
- [ ] Employer confidentiality and disclosure obligations are satisfied.

## Publishing quality

- [ ] Title and description are concrete.
- [ ] Images include useful alt text and rights/source notes.
- [ ] Tags use the canonical vocabulary.
- [ ] Internal links create an onward reading path.
- [ ] Finished work is `status: published` and included in the sitemap; unfinished work remains a non-indexed `seed`.
